description_long: This is a classic brown leather dress shoe with a smooth, polished finish and a rounded toe. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with five eyelets on each side and thin, matching brown laces. The upper is made from a single piece of leather, giving it a sleek and formal appearance, while the interior is lined with a lighter tan material for comfort. The sole is black with visible white stitching along the edge, and the heel is slightly raised, typical of formal footwear. The shoe's construction suggests durability and style, suitable for business or formal urban settings. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A brown leather dress shoe with a smooth finish, lace-up closure, and black stitched sole. It has a rounded toe and a slightly raised heel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, smooth leather upper, and laces tied at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shoe's profile, black stitched sole, and slightly raised heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel, back seam, and opening of the shoe.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the shoe's clean lines and stitching detail.
